# Gemini CLI Project Mandates

This file contains foundational mandates for Gemini CLI in this workspace. These instructions take absolute precedence over general workflows.

## Project Context
- **Framework:** React Native with Expo (Expo Router).
- **Language:** TypeScript.
- **Styling:** React Native StyleSheet (unless otherwise specified).

## Engineering Standards
- **Naming:** Use kebab-case for filenames and PascalCase for React components.
- **Types:** Strictly use TypeScript. Avoid `any`. Prefer interfaces for object shapes.
- **Components:** Functional components with hooks are preferred.
- **Imports:** Use absolute paths where configured (e.g., `@/components/...`) if applicable, otherwise consistent relative paths.

## Development Workflow
- **Validation:** Always run `npx expo lint` (if available) or check for type errors before concluding a task.
- **Testing:** If a testing framework is set up (e.g., Jest), ensure new components have corresponding test files.

## Documentation
- Keep README.md updated with any major architectural changes.

```

# Gemini CLI Project Mandates

This file contains foundational mandates for Gemini CLI in this workspace. These instructions take absolute precedence over general workflows.

## Project Context
- **Framework:** React Native with Expo (Expo Router).
- **Language:** TypeScript.
- **Styling:** React Native StyleSheet (unless otherwise specified).

## Engineering Standards
- **Naming:** Use kebab-case for filenames and PascalCase for React components.

- **Testing:** If a testing framework is set up (e.g., Jest), ensure new components have corresponding test files.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>NutriSync — MVP</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,600;0,700;1,600&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
:root{
  --green:#4a7c2f;--green-d:#2e5a18;--green-l:#eaf2e0;--green-mid:#6a9c4a;
  --brown:#3d2b1a;--brown-btn:#5c3d20;
  --beige:#f5f0e8;--beige-d:#ede5d4;--beige-mid:#d4c9b2;
  --cream:#faf7f2;--white:#ffffff;
  --text:#1e1a12;--text-m:#5a4e3a;--text-l:#8a7a65;
  --radius:14px;--radius-l:22px;
  --shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(46,90,24,.10);--shadow-l:0 10px 48px rgba(46,90,24,.18);
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:#ddd8ce;color:var(--text)}
.screen{display:none;min-height:100vh;flex-direction:column;background:var(--cream)}
.screen.active{display:flex}
/* NAV */
nav.topnav{background:var(--white);border-bottom:1px solid var(--beige-d);padding:0 1.2rem;height:62px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.05)}
.logo-mark{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer}
.logo-svg{width:36px;height:36px;flex-shrink:0}
.logo-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green-d);letter-spacing:-.2px}
.logo-tag{font-size:9px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-l);letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px}
.nav-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.btn-nav{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;border:none;transition:.18s}
.btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--text-m)}.btn-ghost:hover{background:var(--beige)}
.btn-green{background:var(--green);color:#fff}.btn-green:hover{background:var(--green-d)}
/* SCROLL BODY */
.scroll-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto}
/* HERO */
.hero{padding:3.5rem 1.3rem 2.5rem;text-align:center;background:linear-gradient(155deg,var(--cream) 0%,var(--green-l) 100%);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.hero-badge{display:inline-block;background:var(--green-l);color:var(--green-d);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid rgba(74,124,47,.25);margin-bottom:1rem;letter-spacing:.03em}
.hero h1{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,5vw,2.8rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--text);line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:.7rem}
.hero h1 em{color:var(--green);font-style:italic}
.hero p{font-size:14px;color:var(--text-m);max-width:460px;margin:0 auto 1.8rem;line-height:1.7}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:9px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn-primary{background:var(--green);color:#fff;border:none;padding:12px 24px;border-radius:10px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:.18s;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(74,124,47,.28)}
.btn-primary:hover{background:var(--green-d);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.btn-secondary{background:var(--white);color:var(--brown-btn);border:1.5px solid var(--beige-d);padding:12px 24px;border-radius:10px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:.18s}
.btn-secondary:hover{border-color:var(--green);color:var(--green)}
/* SECTION */
.section{padding:1.5rem 1.3rem;max-width:860px;margin:0 auto;width:100%}
.sec-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.3rem}
.sec-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--text-l);margin-bottom:1.4rem}
/* CARDS */
.card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--beige-d);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.1rem 1.2rem;margin-bottom:10px}
.steps-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(170px,1fr));gap:12px}
.step-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--beige-d);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.1rem}
.step-num{width:30px;height:30px;background:var(--green);color:#fff;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.7rem}
.step-card h3{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.step-card p{font-size:12px;color:var(--text-m);line-height:1.55}
/* COOK CARDS */
.cook-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(210px,1fr));gap:12px}
.cook-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--beige-d);border-radius:var(--radius-l);overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.cook-card:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-l);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.cook-img{width:100%;height:130px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--green-l),var(--beige-d));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:44px}
.cook-body{padding:.9rem}
.cook-name{font-weight:600;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:1px}
.cook-loc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l);margin-bottom:.5rem}
.cook-tags{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:.7rem}
.tag{font-size:10px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:5px;background:var(--beige);color:var(--text-m);font-weight:500}
.tag-g{background:var(--green-l);color:var(--green-d)}
.cook-footer{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.stars{font-size:11px;color:var(--brown-btn);font-weight:600}
.price-lbl{font-size:11px;color:var(--green-d);font-weight:600}
/* FORM */
.form-wrap{max-width:500px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;padding:1.8rem 1.3rem}
.form-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.form-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--text-l);margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.field{margin-bottom:1rem}
.field label{display:block;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-m);margin-bottom:.35rem;letter-spacing:.02em;text-transform:uppercase}
.field input,.field select,.field textarea{width:100%;padding:11px 13px;border:1.5px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:10px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;background:var(--white);color:var(--text);transition:.18s;outline:none}
.field input:focus,.field select:focus,.field textarea:focus{border-color:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(74,124,47,.1)}
.field textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:85px}
.upload-box{border:2px dashed var(--beige-mid);border-radius:12px;padding:1.8rem;text-align:center;background:var(--white);cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.upload-box:hover{border-color:var(--green);background:var(--green-l)}
.upload-box p{font-size:13px;color:var(--text-l);margin-top:.5rem}
.upload-box span{font-size:11px;color:var(--green);font-weight:600}
/* STATUS */
.status-track{display:flex;gap:0;margin-bottom:1.2rem;overflow:hidden;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid var(--beige-d)}
.status-step{flex:1;padding:.6rem .3rem;text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;background:var(--white);color:var(--text-l);border-right:1px solid var(--beige-d)}
.status-step:last-child{border-right:none}
.status-step.done{background:var(--green);color:#fff}
.status-step.cur{background:var(--green-l);color:var(--green-d)}
/* PEDIDO CARD */
.pedido-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--beige-d);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.1rem;margin-bottom:10px}
.pedido-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:.7rem}
.pedido-id{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)}
.pedido-user{font-weight:600;font-size:14px}
.pedido-info{font-size:12px;color:var(--text-m);margin-bottom:.7rem;line-height:1.55}
.pbadge{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:20px}
.pbadge-new{background:#fff3cc;color:#7a4f00}
.pbadge-prep{background:var(--green-l);color:var(--green-d)}
.pbadge-done{background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a3a6b}
.receita-box{background:var(--beige);border-radius:8px;padding:.75rem;margin-bottom:.75rem;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-m);line-height:1.6;border-left:3px solid var(--green)}
.receita-lbl{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:.25rem}
.pedido-actions{display:flex;gap:7px}
.btn-accept{flex:1;background:var(--green);color:#fff;border:none;padding:9px;border-radius:8px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer}
.btn-reject{flex:1;background:transparent;color:var(--text-m);border:1.5px solid var(--beige-mid);padding:9px;border-radius:8px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer}
/* BOTTOM NAV */
.bottom-nav{position:sticky;bottom:0;background:var(--white);border-top:1px solid var(--beige-d);display:flex;padding:.5rem 0;z-index:100;box-shadow:0 -3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
.bnav-btn{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;cursor:pointer;padding:.3rem;border:none;background:none;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--text-l)}
.bnav-btn span{font-size:9px;font-weight:500}
.bnav-btn.on{color:var(--green)}
/* AVATAR */
.avatar{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green-l);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--green-d);flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer}
/* MISC */
.chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;background:var(--green-l);color:var(--green-d);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:20px;margin:2px}
.divider{height:1px;background:var(--beige-d);margin:.9rem 0}
.link{color:var(--green);font-size:13px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer}
.link:hover{text-decoration:underline}
/* MODAL */
.overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.45);z-index:200;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center}
.overlay.open{display:flex}
.modal{background:var(--white);border-radius:var(--radius-l) var(--radius-l) 0 0;width:100%;max-width:500px;padding:1.4rem;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto}
.modal-handle{width:38px;height:4px;background:var(--beige-mid);border-radius:2px;margin:0 auto 1.1rem}
.modal-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.25rem}
@media(min-width:560px){.overlay{align-items:center}.modal{border-radius:var(--radius-l);max-width:460px;margin:1rem}}
/* DEMO MENU */
.demo-fab{position:fixed;bottom:76px;right:14px;z-index:300;width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--brown-btn);color:#fff;border:none;font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.demo-panel{display:none;position:fixed;bottom:126px;right:14px;z-index:300;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--beige-d);border-radius:var(--radius);box-shadow:var(--shadow-l);min-width:210px;overflow:hidden}
.demo-panel.open{display:block}
.demo-panel-hd{padding:.5rem .9rem;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-l);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;background:var(--beige);border-bottom:1px solid var(--beige-d)}
.demo-panel-body{max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto}
.dbtn{display:block;width:100%;text-align:left;padding:.55rem .9rem;border:none;background:none;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);cursor:pointer}
.dbtn:hover{background:var(--beige)}
</style>
</head>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
  TELA 1 — LANDING
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="screen active" id="s-home">
  <nav class="topnav">
    <div class="logo-mark">
      <svg class="logo-svg"><use href="#ns-logo"/></svg>
      <div><div class="logo-name">NutriSync</div><div class="logo-tag">sua receita, nossa marmita</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-right">
      <button class="btn-nav btn-ghost" onclick="go('s-login')">Entrar</button>
      <button class="btn-nav btn-green" onclick="go('s-cadastro')">Cadastrar</button>
    </div>
  </nav>
  <div class="scroll-body">
    <div class="hero">
      <div class="hero-badge">🥦 Marketplace de Marmitas Personalizadas</div>
      <h1>Você tem a receita.<br><em>A gente entrega</em> a marmita.</h1>
      <p>Envie o plano do seu nutricionista e cozinheiros parceiros montam suas marmitas exatamente como prescrito. Sem improvisar. Sem furar a dieta.</p>
      <div class="hero-btns">
        <button class="btn-primary" onclick="go('s-cadastro')">Quero pedir minhas marmitas</button>
        <button class="btn-secondary" onclick="go('s-cozinheiros')">Ver cozinheiros</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="section">
      <div class="sec-title">Como funciona</div>
      <div class="sec-sub">Do consultório à sua mesa em 4 passos</div>
      <div class="steps-grid">
        <div class="step-card"><div class="step-num">1</div><h3>Crie sua conta</h3><p>Cadastre perfil com objetivo e restrições alimentares.</p></div>
        <div class="step-card"><div class="step-num">2</div><h3>Envie sua receita</h3><p>Foto do plano nutricional ou preencha um formulário.</p></div>
        <div class="step-card"><div class="step-num">3</div><h3>Cozinheiro monta</h3><p>Profissional parceiro prepara conforme prescrito.</p></div>
        <div class="step-card"><div class="step-num">4</div><h3>Receba e avalie</h3><p>Marmitas chegam prontas. Avalie e repita semanalmente.</p></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--green-l);padding:1.8rem 1.3rem">
      <div style="max-width:860px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:220px">
          <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;margin-bottom:.35rem">Não tem receita?</div>
          <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.4rem">Use nosso cardápio sugerido</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-m);line-height:1.6">Planos de emagrecimento, hipertrofia ou manutenção — preparados por cozinheiros reais.</div>
        </div>
        <button class="btn-primary" onclick="go('s-sem-receita')" style="white-space:nowrap">Ver cardápios →</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="height:1.5rem"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
  TELA 2 — CADASTRO
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="screen" id="s-cadastro">
  <nav class="topnav">
    <div class="logo-mark" onclick="go('s-home')">
      <svg class="logo-svg"><use href="#ns-logo"/></svg>
      <div><div class="logo-name">NutriSync</div><div class="logo-tag">sua receita, nossa marmita</div></div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-nav btn-ghost" onclick="go('s-login')">Já tenho conta</button>
  </nav>
  <div class="scroll-body" style="background:var(--beige)">
    <div class="form-wrap">
      <div class="form-title">Criar conta</div>
      <div class="form-sub">Escolha seu perfil para personalizar o cadastro</div>

      <!-- SELETOR DE TIPO -->
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:9px;margin-bottom:1.3rem">
        <div id="tp-u" onclick="selTipo('u')" style="border:2px solid var(--green);border-radius:12px;padding:.9rem;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;background:var(--green-l)">
          <div style="font-size:22px;margin-bottom:.3rem">🧑</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green-d)">Sou cliente</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">Quero pedir marmitas</div>
        </div>
        <div id="tp-c" onclick="selTipo('c')" style="border:2px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:12px;padding:.9rem;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;background:var(--white)">
          <div style="font-size:22px;margin-bottom:.3rem">👨‍🍳</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)">Sou cozinheiro</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">Quero oferecer marmitas</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- CAMPOS COMUNS -->
      <div class="field"><label>Nome completo</label><input type="text" placeholder="Ex: Maria Silva"/></div>
      <div class="field"><label>E-mail</label><input type="email" placeholder="maria@email.com"/></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Telefone / WhatsApp</label><input type="tel" placeholder="(81) 99999-9999"/></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Senha</label><input type="password" placeholder="Mínimo 8 caracteres"/></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Confirmar senha</label><input type="password" placeholder="Repita a senha"/></div>

      <!-- SEÇÃO CLIENTE -->
      <div id="sec-cliente">
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:.9rem">
          <div style="width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--green-l);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px">🎯</div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-m);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em">Seu objetivo alimentar</div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Objetivo principal</label>
          <select>
            <option>Emagrecer</option>
            <option>Ganhar massa muscular</option>
            <option>Manutenção do peso</option>
            <option>Saúde e qualidade de vida</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="field"><label>Restrições alimentares (opcional)</label><input type="text" placeholder="Ex: sem glúten, sem lactose, sem amendoim"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Bairro para entrega</label><input type="text" placeholder="Ex: Boa Viagem, Recife"/></div>
        <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%;margin-top:.4rem;padding:13px" onclick="go('s-enviar-receita')">Criar minha conta</button>
      </div>

      <!-- SEÇÃO COZINHEIRO -->
      <div id="sec-cozinheiro" style="display:none">
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:.9rem">
          <div style="width:28px;height:28px;background:#fff3cc;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px">🍳</div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-m);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em">Informações do cozinheiro</div>
        </div>
        <div class="field"><label>Bairro / localização</label><input type="text" placeholder="Ex: Boa Viagem, Recife"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Preço por marmita (R$)</label><input type="number" placeholder="Ex: 18" min="5" step="0.5"/></div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Especialidades (selecione todas que se aplicam)</label>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:7px;margin-top:.4rem" id="espec-grid">
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;padding:.4rem .6rem;border:1.5px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:8px;background:var(--white)"><input type="checkbox" style="accent-color:var(--green)"/> Low carb</label>
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;padding:.4rem .6rem;border:1.5px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:8px;background:var(--white)"><input type="checkbox" style="accent-color:var(--green)"/> Hipertrofia</label>
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;padding:.4rem .6rem;border:1.5px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:8px;background:var(--white)"><input type="checkbox" style="accent-color:var(--green)"/> Vegano</label>
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;padding:.4rem .6rem;border:1.5px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:8px;background:var(--white)"><input type="checkbox" style="accent-color:var(--green)"/> Sem glúten</label>
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;padding:.4rem .6rem;border:1.5px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:8px;background:var(--white)"><input type="checkbox" style="accent-color:var(--green)"/> Sem lactose</label>
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;padding:.4rem .6rem;border:1.5px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:8px;background:var(--white)"><input type="checkbox" style="accent-color:var(--green)"/> Diabéticos</label>
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;padding:.4rem .6rem;border:1.5px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:8px;background:var(--white)"><input type="checkbox" style="accent-color:var(--green)"/> Emagrecimento</label>
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;padding:.4rem .6rem;border:1.5px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:8px;background:var(--white)"><input type="checkbox" style="accent-color:var(--green)"/> Manutenção</label>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Raio de entrega</label>
          <select>
            <option>Só meu bairro</option>
            <option>Até 5 km</option>
            <option>Até 10 km</option>
            <option>Toda a cidade</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Sobre você (aparece no seu perfil público)</label>
          <textarea placeholder="Ex: Cozinheira especializada em alimentação saudável há 3 anos. Sigo receitas de nutricionistas à risca e garanto gramatura correta..."></textarea>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--green-l);border-radius:10px;padding:.85rem;margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:12px;color:var(--green-d);line-height:1.6">
          <strong>🔒 Verificação posterior:</strong> após o cadastro, nossa equipe entrará em contato via WhatsApp para verificar sua cozinha. Só cozinheiros verificados aparecem no marketplace.
        </div>
        <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%;margin-top:.2rem;padding:13px;background:var(--brown-btn)" onclick="go('s-painel-cook')">Cadastrar como cozinheiro</button>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:.9rem;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-l)">Já tem conta? <span class="link" onclick="go('s-login')">Entrar</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
  TELA 3 — LOGIN
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="screen" id="s-login">
  <nav class="topnav">
    <div class="logo-mark" onclick="go('s-home')">
      <svg class="logo-svg"><use href="#ns-logo"/></svg>
      <div><div class="logo-name">NutriSync</div><div class="logo-tag">sua receita, nossa marmita</div></div>
    </div>
  </nav>
  <div class="scroll-body" style="background:var(--beige);display:flex;align-items:center">
    <div class="form-wrap" style="margin:auto">
      <div class="form-title">Bem-vindo de volta</div>
      <div class="form-sub">Acesse sua conta NutriSync</div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:1.3rem">
        <button id="lt-u" onclick="selLogin('u')" style="padding:9px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--green);background:var(--green-l);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green-d);cursor:pointer">Cliente</button>
        <button id="lt-c" onclick="selLogin('c')" style="padding:9px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--beige-mid);background:var(--white);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer">Cozinheiro</button>
      </div>
      <div class="field"><label>E-mail</label><input type="email" placeholder="seu@email.com"/></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Senha</label><input type="password" placeholder="••••••••"/></div>
      <div style="text-align:right;margin-bottom:1.1rem"><span class="link" style="font-size:12px">Esqueceu a senha?</span></div>
      <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%;padding:13px" onclick="go('s-home-user')">Entrar</button>
      <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:.9rem;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-l)">Não tem conta? <span class="link" onclick="go('s-cadastro')">Cadastrar</span></div>
      <div class="divider"></div>
      <button class="btn-secondary" style="width:100%;padding:11px" onclick="go('s-painel-cook')">Entrar como cozinheiro (demo)</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
  TELA 4 — HOME CLIENTE
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="screen" id="s-home-user">
  <nav class="topnav">
    <div class="logo-mark"><svg class="logo-svg"><use href="#ns-logo"/></svg><div><div class="logo-name">NutriSync</div><div class="logo-tag">sua receita, nossa marmita</div></div></div>
    <div class="avatar" onclick="go('s-perfil')">M</div>
  </nav>
  <div class="scroll-body">
    <div class="section">
      <div style="display:flex;gap:11px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:1.3rem">
        <div class="avatar" style="width:46px;height:46px;font-size:17px">M</div>
        <div><div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700">Olá, Maria 👋</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-l)">O que vamos comer essa semana?</div></div>
      </div>
      <!-- CTA PRINCIPAL -->
      <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--green-d),var(--green-mid));border-radius:var(--radius-l);padding:1.4rem;color:#fff;margin-bottom:9px;cursor:pointer" onclick="go('s-enviar-receita')">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;opacity:.7;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;margin-bottom:.35rem">Novo pedido</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.35rem">Enviar minha receita</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;opacity:.8;margin-bottom:.9rem">Foto ou formulário — cozinheiros recebem na hora</div>
        <div style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);padding:6px 13px;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600">Enviar agora →</div>
      </div>
      <button class="btn-secondary" style="width:100%;margin-bottom:1.3rem" onclick="go('s-sem-receita')">Sem receita — ver cardápios sugeridos</button>
      <!-- PEDIDO ATIVO -->
      <div style="font-weight:600;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:.7rem">Pedido em andamento</div>
      <div class="pedido-card" onclick="go('s-status')" style="cursor:pointer">
        <div class="pedido-header"><div><div class="pedido-id">Pedido #0042 · hoje</div><div class="pedido-user">Ana Paula</div></div><span class="pbadge pbadge-prep">Em preparo</span></div>
        <div class="status-track"><div class="status-step done">Recebido</div><div class="status-step cur">Preparo</div><div class="status-step">Pronto</div><div class="status-step">Entregue</div></div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-l)">5 marmitas · Low carb · Previsão: hoje às 18h</div>
      </div>
      <!-- COZINHEIROS -->
      <div style="font-weight:600;font-size:14px;margin:.5rem 0 .7rem">Cozinheiros próximos</div>
      <div class="cook-grid">
        <div class="cook-card" onclick="openOverlay('ov-cook')"><div class="cook-img">👩‍🍳</div><div class="cook-body"><div class="cook-name">Ana Paula</div><div class="cook-loc">📍 Boa Viagem</div><div class="cook-tags"><span class="tag tag-g">Low carb</span><span class="tag">Sem glúten</span></div><div class="cook-footer"><span class="stars">★ 4.9 (38)</span><span class="price-lbl">R$18/uni</span></div></div></div>
        <div class="cook-card" onclick="openOverlay('ov-cook')"><div class="cook-img">👨‍🍳</div><div class="cook-body"><div class="cook-name">Carlos Melo</div><div class="cook-loc">📍 Casa Amarela</div><div class="cook-tags"><span class="tag tag-g">Hipertrofia</span><span class="tag">Vegano</span></div><div class="cook-footer"><span class="stars">★ 4.7 (21)</span><span class="price-lbl">R$22/uni</span></div></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <nav class="bottom-nav">
    <button class="bnav-btn on"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M10 20v-6h4v6h5v-8h3L12 3 2 12h3v8z"/></svg><span>Início</span></button>
    <button class="bnav-btn" onclick="go('s-cozinheiros')"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.35-4.35"/></svg><span>Buscar</span></button>
    <button class="bnav-btn" onclick="go('s-pedidos')"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M9 5H7a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h10a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-2"/><rect x="9" y="3" width="6" height="4" rx="1"/></svg><span>Pedidos</span></button>
    <button class="bnav-btn" onclick="go('s-perfil')"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="8" r="4"/><path d="M4 20c0-4 3.6-7 8-7s8 3 8 7"/></svg><span>Perfil</span></button>
  </nav>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
  TELA 5 — ENVIAR RECEITA
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="screen" id="s-enviar-receita">
  <nav class="topnav">
    <button class="btn-nav btn-ghost" onclick="go('s-home-user')" style="padding:8px 10px">← Voltar</button>
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700">Enviar Receita</div>
    <div style="width:70px"></div>
  </nav>
  <div class="scroll-body" style="background:var(--beige)">
    <div class="form-wrap">
      <div class="form-title">Sua prescrição</div>
      <div class="form-sub">Quanto mais detalhes, melhor o cozinheiro prepara suas marmitas.</div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:9px;margin-bottom:1.3rem">
        <div id="op-foto" onclick="selOp('foto')" style="border:2px solid var(--green);border-radius:12px;padding:.85rem;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;background:var(--green-l)">
          <div style="font-size:20px;margin-bottom:.2rem">📷</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green-d)">Foto da receita</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">Upload de imagem</div>
        </div>
        <div id="op-form" onclick="selOp('form')" style="border:2px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:12px;padding:.85rem;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;background:var(--white)">
          <div style="font-size:20px;margin-bottom:.2rem">📝</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)">Formulário</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">Digitar manualmente</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="area-foto">
        <div class="upload-box">
          <svg width="34" height="34" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#4a7c2f" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5"/><polyline points="21 15 16 10 5 21"/></svg>
          <p>Toque para selecionar a foto</p>
          <span>JPG, PNG ou PDF — até 10MB</span>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l);text-align:center;margin-top:.4rem">A foto vai diretamente para o cozinheiro escolhido</div>
      </div>
      <div id="area-form" style="display:none">
        <div class="field"><label>Refeições por dia</label><select><option>3 refeições</option><option>4 refeições</option><option>5 refeições</option><option>6 refeições</option></select></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Calorias diárias</label><input type="number" placeholder="Ex: 1800 kcal"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Restrições e alergias</label><input type="text" placeholder="Ex: sem lactose, sem glúten"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Alimentos proibidos</label><input type="text" placeholder="Ex: amendoim, frutos do mar"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Observações do nutricionista</label><textarea placeholder="Cole aqui as orientações específicas..."></textarea></div>
      </div>
      <div class="divider"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Quantidade de dias</label><select><option>5 dias (seg–sex)</option><option>7 dias (semana completa)</option><option>3 dias</option></select></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Porções por refeição</label><select><option>1 porção</option><option>2 porções</option></select></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Observações adicionais (opcional)</label><textarea placeholder="Ex: sem pimenta, prefiro frango grelhado..."></textarea></div>
      <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%;padding:13px;margin-top:.4rem" onclick="go('s-cozinheiros')">Ver cozinheiros disponíveis →</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
  TELA 6 — MARKETPLACE COZINHEIROS
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="screen" id="s-cozinheiros">
  <nav class="topnav">
    <button class="btn-nav btn-ghost" onclick="go('s-home-user')" style="padding:8px 10px">← Voltar</button>
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700">Cozinheiros</div>
    <div style="width:70px"></div>
  </nav>
  <div class="scroll-body">
    <div class="section">
      <div style="position:relative;margin-bottom:.7rem">

      </div>

        <span class="chip" style="cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap">Todos</span>
        <span style="display:inline-flex;border:1px solid var(--beige-mid);color:var(--text-m);font-size:11px;font-weight:500;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;background:var(--white)">Low carb</span>
        <span style="display:inline-flex;border:1px solid var(--beige-mid);color:var(--text-m);font-size:11px;font-weight:500;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;background:var(--white)">Hipertrofia</span>
        <span style="display:inline-flex;border:1px solid var(--beige-mid);color:var(--text-m);font-size:11px;font-weight:500;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;background:var(--white)">Vegano</span>
        <span style="display:inline-flex;border:1px solid var(--beige-mid);color:var(--text-m);font-size:11px;font-weight:500;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;background:var(--white)">Sem glúten</span>
      </div>
      <div class="cook-grid">
        <div class="cook-card" onclick="openOverlay('ov-cook')"><div class="cook-img">👩‍🍳</div><div class="cook-body"><div class="cook-name">Ana Paula</div><div class="cook-loc">📍 Boa Viagem</div><div class="cook-tags"><span class="tag tag-g">Low carb</span><span class="tag">Sem glúten</span></div><div class="cook-footer"><span class="stars">★ 4.9 (38)</span><span class="price-lbl">R$18/uni</span></div></div></div>
        <div class="cook-card" onclick="openOverlay('ov-cook')"><div class="cook-img">👨‍🍳</div><div class="cook-body"><div class="cook-name">Carlos Melo</div><div class="cook-loc">📍 Casa Amarela</div><div class="cook-tags"><span class="tag tag-g">Hipertrofia</span><span class="tag">Vegano</span></div><div class="cook-footer"><span class="stars">★ 4.7 (21)</span><span class="price-lbl">R$22/uni</span></div></div></div>
        <div class="cook-card" onclick="openOverlay('ov-cook')"><div class="cook-img">👩‍🍳</div><div class="cook-body"><div class="cook-name">Fernanda Lima</div><div class="cook-loc">📍 Graças</div><div class="cook-tags"><span class="tag tag-g">Emagrecimento</span><span class="tag">Diabéticos</span></div><div class="cook-footer"><span class="stars">★ 5.0 (12)</span><span class="price-lbl">R$20/uni</span></div></div></div>
        <div class="cook-card" onclick="openOverlay('ov-cook')"><div class="cook-img">👨‍🍳</div><div class="cook-body"><div class="cook-name">Roberto Santos</div><div class="cook-loc">📍 Afogados</div><div class="cook-tags"><span class="tag tag-g">Manutenção</span><span class="tag">Proteico</span></div><div class="cook-footer"><span class="stars">★ 4.6 (44)</span><span class="price-lbl">R$16/uni</span></div></div></div>

</div>

<div class="screen" id="s-confirmar">

  </nav>
  <div class="scroll-body" style="background:var(--beige)">
    <div class="form-wrap">
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:1.1rem">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:.5rem">Cozinheiro selecionado</div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:11px;align-items:center"><div style="font-size:28px">👩‍🍳</div><div><div style="font-weight:600;font-size:15px">Ana Paula</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-l)">📍 Boa Viagem · ★ 4.9</div></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:1.1rem">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:.5rem">Sua receita</div>
        <div class="receita-box" style="margin-bottom:0"><div class="receita-lbl">Plano enviado</div>Foto da prescrição · Low carb · Sem glúten · 5 refeições/dia</div>
      </div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:1.1rem">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:.7rem">Resumo</div>
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:13px;padding:.35rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--beige-d)"><span style="color:var(--text-m)">Marmitas</span><span style="font-weight:500">5 dias × 1 = 5 unidades</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:13px;padding:.35rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--beige-d)"><span style="color:var(--text-m)">Valor</span><span style="font-weight:500">R$ 18,00/unidade</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:13px;padding:.35rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--beige-d)"><span style="color:var(--text-m)">Entrega</span><span style="font-weight:500">R$ 8,00</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:15px;padding:.5rem 0;font-weight:700"><span>Total</span><span style="color:var(--green-d)">R$ 98,00</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:1.3rem">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:.7rem">Pagamento</div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:7px;margin-bottom:.6rem">
          <div style="flex:1;border:2px solid var(--green);border-radius:10px;padding:.65rem;text-align:center;background:var(--green-l);cursor:pointer"><div style="font-size:18px">💚</div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green-d)">PIX</div></div>
          <div style="flex:1;border:2px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:10px;padding:.65rem;text-align:center;background:var(--white);cursor:pointer"><div style="font-size:18px">💳</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-m)">Cartão</div></div>
          <div style="flex:1;border:2px solid var(--beige-mid);border-radius:10px;padding:.65rem;text-align:center;background:var(--white);cursor:pointer"><div style="font-size:18px">💬</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-m)">WhatsApp</div></div>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l);text-align:center">Pagamento simulado — MVP acadêmico</div>
      </div>
      <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%;padding:13px" onclick="go('s-status')">Confirmar pedido · R$ 98,00</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

      <div style="text-align:center;padding:1.4rem 1rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--green-l),var(--beige));border-radius:var(--radius-l);margin-bottom:1.1rem">
        <div style="font-size:46px;margin-bottom:.4rem">🍱</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--green-d);margin-bottom:.25rem">Em preparo</div>

      </div>

        <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-m);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;margin-bottom:.9rem">Acompanhamento</div>
        <div style="position:relative;padding-left:26px">
          <div style="position:absolute;left:7px;top:0;bottom:0;width:2px;background:var(--beige-d)"></div>
          <div style="position:relative;margin-bottom:14px"><div style="position:absolute;left:-22px;top:2px;width:13px;height:13px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #fff,0 0 0 3px var(--green)"></div><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600">Pedido recebido</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">Hoje, 12h30</div></div>
          <div style="position:relative;margin-bottom:14px"><div style="position:absolute;left:-22px;top:2px;width:13px;height:13px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #fff,0 0 0 3px var(--green)"></div><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600">Cozinheiro aceitou</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">Hoje, 12h45</div></div>
          <div style="position:relative;margin-bottom:14px"><div style="position:absolute;left:-22px;top:2px;width:13px;height:13px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green-mid);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #fff,0 0 0 3px var(--green-mid)"></div><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green-d)">Em preparo ← agora</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">Hoje, 14h00</div></div>
          <div style="position:relative;margin-bottom:14px;opacity:.35"><div style="position:absolute;left:-22px;top:2px;width:13px;height:13px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--beige-mid)"></div><div style="font-size:13px">Pronto para entrega</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">Previsto: 17h00</div></div>
          <div style="position:relative;opacity:.35"><div style="position:absolute;left:-22px;top:2px;width:13px;height:13px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--beige-mid)"></div><div style="font-size:13px">Entregue</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">Previsto: 18h00</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-m);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;margin-bottom:.7rem">Detalhes</div>
        <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-m);line-height:2">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between"><span>Cozinheiro</span><span style="font-weight:500">Ana Paula</span></div>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between"><span>Marmitas</span><span style="font-weight:500">5 unidades</span></div>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between"><span>Plano</span><span style="font-weight:500">Low carb · 5 dias</span></div>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between"><span>Total</span><span style="font-weight:600;color:var(--green-d)">R$ 98,00</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

      <div class="card" style="cursor:pointer"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center"><span style="font-weight:500;font-size:14px">Editar perfil e restrições</span><span style="color:var(--text-l)">→</span></div></div>

<div class="screen" id="s-sem-receita">
  <nav class="topnav">

      <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-m);margin-bottom:1.1rem;background:var(--green-l);padding:.75rem 1rem;border-radius:10px;border-left:3px solid var(--green)">Escolha um plano padrão — cozinheiros parceiros preparam tudo para você, mesmo sem receita de nutricionista.</div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px">

        <div class="card" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="go('s-cozinheiros')"><div style="display:flex;gap:13px;align-items:center"><div style="font-size:34px">💪</div><div style="flex:1"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:1px">Hipertrofia</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-l);margin-bottom:.35rem">2.800–3.200 kcal · alto proteico · rico em carbos</div><div style="display:flex;gap:4px"><span class="tag tag-g">Alto proteico</span><span class="tag">6 refeições/dia</span></div></div><span style="color:var(--green);font-size:18px">→</span></div></div>
        <div class="card" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="go('s-cozinheiros')"><div style="display:flex;gap:13px;align-items:center"><div style="font-size:34px">⚖️</div><div style="flex:1"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:1px">Manutenção</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-l);margin-bottom:.35rem">2.000–2.200 kcal · equilibrado · variado</div><div style="display:flex;gap:4px"><span class="tag tag-g">Equilibrado</span><span class="tag">5 refeições/dia</span></div></div><span style="color:var(--green);font-size:18px">→</span></div></div>
        <div class="card" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="go('s-cozinheiros')"><div style="display:flex;gap:13px;align-items:center"><div style="font-size:34px">🌱</div><div style="flex:1"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:1px">Vegano saudável</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-l);margin-bottom:.35rem">1.800 kcal · 100% vegetal · nutritivo</div><div style="display:flex;gap:4px"><span class="tag tag-g">Vegano</span><span class="tag">Sem animal</span></div></div><span style="color:var(--green);font-size:18px">→</span></div></div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════

════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="overlay" id="ov-cook" onclick="closeOverlay('ov-cook')">
  <div class="modal" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="modal-handle"></div>
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:.9rem">
      <div style="font-size:50px;margin-bottom:.35rem">👩‍🍳</div>
      <div class="modal-title">Ana Paula</div>
      <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-l)">📍 Boa Viagem, Recife · ★ 4.9 (38 avaliações)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:.9rem"><span class="chip">Low carb</span><span class="chip">Sem glúten</span><span class="chip">Sem lactose</span><span class="chip">Diabéticos</span></div>
    <div class="receita-box" style="margin-bottom:.9rem"><div class="receita-lbl">Sobre mim</div>Cozinheira especializada em alimentação saudável há 4 anos. Trabalho com receitas de nutricionistas e garanto gramatura exata. Aceito prescrições e cardápios personalizados.</div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:7px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:1.1rem">
      <div style="background:var(--beige);border-radius:9px;padding:.65rem"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:var(--green-d)">38</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">pedidos</div></div>
      <div style="background:var(--beige);border-radius:9px;padding:.65rem"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:var(--green-d)">4.9★</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">avaliação</div></div>
      <div style="background:var(--beige);border-radius:9px;padding:.65rem"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:var(--green-d)">R$18</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-l)">por marmita</div></div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%;padding:12px" onclick="closeOverlay('ov-cook');go('s-confirmar')">Escolher Ana Paula</button>
    <button class="btn-secondary" style="width:100%;padding:10px;margin-top:7px" onclick="closeOverlay('ov-cook')">Voltar</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- DEMO NAV FAB -->
<button class="demo-fab" onclick="document.getElementById('dmenu').classList.toggle('open')">☰</button>
<div class="demo-panel" id="dmenu">
  <div class="demo-panel-hd">Navegar entre telas</div>
  <div class="demo-panel-body">
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-home')">🏠 Landing page</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-cadastro')">📝 Cadastro</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-login')">🔑 Login</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-home-user')">👤 Home cliente</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-enviar-receita')">📷 Enviar receita</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-cozinheiros')">🔍 Marketplace</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-confirmar')">🛒 Confirmar pedido</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-status')">📦 Status do pedido</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-pedidos')">📋 Meus pedidos</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-avaliacao')">⭐ Avaliação</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-perfil')">👤 Perfil</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-sem-receita')">🥗 Cardápios sugeridos</button>
    <button class="dbtn" onclick="nav('s-painel-cook')">👨‍🍳 Painel cozinheiro</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
function go(id){
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));
  const el=document.getElementById(id);
  if(el){el.classList.add('active');el.scrollTop=0;window.scrollTo(0,0);}
  document.getElementById('dmenu').classList.remove('open');
}
function nav(id){go(id);}
function openOverlay(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.add('open');}
function closeOverlay(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open');}
function selTipo(t){
  // Estilo dos cartões de seleção
  const elU=document.getElementById('tp-u');
  const elC=document.getElementById('tp-c');
  elU.style.border=t==='u'?'2px solid var(--green)':'2px solid var(--beige-mid)';
  elU.style.background=t==='u'?'var(--green-l)':'var(--white)';
  elC.style.border=t==='c'?'2px solid var(--green)':'2px solid var(--beige-mid)';
  elC.style.background=t==='c'?'var(--green-l)':'var(--white)';
  // Mostrar seção correta
  document.getElementById('sec-cliente').style.display=t==='u'?'block':'none';
  document.getElementById('sec-cozinheiro').style.display=t==='c'?'block':'none';
}
function selLogin(t){
  const su={borderColor:'var(--green)',background:'var(--green-l)'};
  const su2={borderColor:'var(--beige-mid)',background:'var(--white)'};
  Object.assign(document.getElementById('lt-u').style,t==='u'?su:su2);
  Object.assign(document.getElementById('lt-c').style,t==='c'?su:su2);
}
function selOp(t){
  document.getElementById('op-foto').style.borderColor=t==='foto'?'var(--green)':'var(--beige-mid)';
  document.getElementById('op-foto').style.background=t==='foto'?'var(--green-l)':'var(--white)';
  document.getElementById('op-form').style.borderColor=t==='form'?'var(--green)':'var(--beige-mid)';
  document.getElementById('op-form').style.background=t==='form'?'var(--green-l)':'var(--white)';
  document.getElementById('area-foto').style.display=t==='foto'?'block':'none';
  document.getElementById('area-form').style.display=t==='form'?'block':'none';
}
function setStar(n){
  document.querySelectorAll('#stars span').forEach((s,i)=>{s.style.filter=i<n?'none':'grayscale(1)';});
}
</script>
</body>
</html>

# Gemini CLI Project Mandates

This file contains foundational mandates for Gemini CLI in this workspace. These instructions take absolute precedence over general workflows.

## Project Context
- **Framework:** React Native with Expo (Expo Router).
- **Language:** TypeScript.
- **Styling:** React Native StyleSheet (unless otherwise specified).
- **Reference Prototype:** The `main.html` file in the root directory contains the complete MVP prototype (HTML/CSS/JS). Use it as the primary reference for features, business logic, and UI/UX design during the React Native implementation.

## Engineering Standards
- **Naming:** Use kebab-case for filenames and PascalCase for React components.
- **Types:** Strictly use TypeScript. Avoid `any`. Prefer interfaces for object shapes.
- **Components:** Functional components with hooks are preferred.
- **Imports:** Use absolute path aliases configured in `tsconfig.json` (e.g., `@/components/...`) over relative paths.

## Development Workflow
- **Validation:** Always run `npx expo lint` (if available) or check for type errors before concluding a task.
- **Testing:** If a testing framework is set up (e.g., Jest), ensure new components have corresponding test files.

## Documentation
- Keep README.md updated with any major architectural changes.
```

# Gemini CLI Project Mandates

This file contains foundational mandates for Gemini CLI in this workspace. These instructions take absolute precedence over general workflows.

## Project Context
- **Framework:** React Native with Expo (Expo Router).
- **Language:** TypeScript.
- **Styling:** React Native StyleSheet (unless otherwise specified).
- **Reference Prototype:** The `web-prototype/` directory contains the modularized MVP (HTML/CSS/JS). Use the individual `.html` files, `styles.css`, and `scripts.js` as the primary reference for features, business logic, and UI/UX design during the React Native implementation.

## Engineering Standards
- **Naming:** Use kebab-case for filenames and PascalCase for React components.
- **Types:** Strictly use TypeScript. Avoid `any`. Prefer interfaces for object shapes.
- **Components:** Functional components with hooks are preferred.
- **Imports:** Use absolute path aliases configured in `tsconfig.json` (e.g., `@/components/...`) over relative paths.

## Development Workflow
- **Validation:** Always run `npx expo lint` (if available) or check for type errors before concluding a task.
- **Testing:** If a testing framework is set up (e.g., Jest), ensure new components have corresponding test files.

## Documentation
- Keep README.md updated with any major architectural changes.
```

# Implementation Plan: Web-Prototype to React Native (Expo)

This plan outlines the migration of the `web-prototype/` (HTML/CSS/JS) into the existing React Native / Expo Router application.

## Phase 1: Foundation & Theming
- [ ] **Theme Definition:** Translate CSS variables from `web-prototype/styles.css` into a React Native theme object (already partially started in `constants/theme.ts`).
- [ ] **Shared Layouts:** Implement the `topnav` and `bottom-nav` as reusable React components in `@/components/layout/`.
- [ ] **Common UI Components:** Create atomic components based on prototype styles:
  - `Button`: Primary, Secondary, Ghost, Green.
  - `Card`: Standard and specialized (PedidoCard, CookCard).
  - `Typography`: Themed text components (ThemedText).

## Phase 2: Navigation (Expo Router)
- [ ] **Route Mapping:** Configure the `app/` directory to match the prototype's screen structure:
  - `(auth)/login.tsx` (s-login)
  - `(auth)/register.tsx` (s-cadastro)
  - `(tabs)/index.tsx` (s-home-user)
  - `(tabs)/orders.tsx` (s-pedidos)
  - `(tabs)/profile.tsx` (s-perfil)
  - `(user)/order-recipe.tsx` (s-enviar-receita)
  - `(user)/marketplace.tsx` (s-cozinheiros)
  - `(user)/confirm-order.tsx` (s-confirmar)
  - `(user)/order-status.tsx` (s-status)
  - `(cook)/dashboard.tsx` (s-painel-cook)

## Phase 3: State & Logic Implementation
- [ ] **Authentication State:** Implement a basic auth provider to toggle between "Client" and "Cook" views.
- [ ] **Navigation Logic:** Replace `go(id)` and `nav(id)` with Expo Router's `router.push()` and `router.replace()`.
- [ ] **Data Mocking:** Create mock data objects for Cozinheiros and Pedidos based on `scripts.js` and `main.html` content.

## Phase 4: UI Migration (Screen by Screen)
- [ ] **Landing/Home:** Port `index.html` (s-home) to `app/index.tsx`.
- [ ] **Forms:** Port registration and login forms with validation.
- [ ] **Marketplace:** Implement the search and filter logic from `cozinheiros.html`.
- [ ] **Order Flow:** Port the recipe upload/form and confirmation screens.
- [ ] **Cook Panel:** Implement the order management dashboard for cozinheiros.

## Phase 5: Refinement & Validation
- [ ] **Platform Consistency:** Ensure styles look native on both iOS and Android.
- [ ] **Asset Integration:** Replace placeholder emojis/icons with SVGs or Expo Symbols.
- [ ] **Final Linting:** Run `npx expo lint` to ensure code quality.

## AI Implementation Guidelines
- **Surgical Translation:** When porting a screen, use the corresponding `.html` file from `web-prototype/` for structure and the `scripts.js` for interactivity logic.
- **Style Mapping:** Map HTML classes (e.g., `.btn-primary`) directly to the established React Native theme constants.
- **Functional Components:** Always use functional components with hooks (`useState`, `useEffect`, `useRouter`).
- **TypeScript:** Define interfaces for all data structures (Order, User, Cook).

```
